---
title: "Advanced plotting SHM-CITA events"
author:
  name: C.A.M. van Bergen
  affiliation: Leiden University Medical Center
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B %Y')`"
output: 
  html_document:
    keep_md : true
---

```{r setup}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

#### libraries and functions

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# load packages and user-defined functions
#source("~/repositories/FL_10X_2/000_Documents/kees_functions.R")
library(R.utils)
library(tidyverse)
library(DescTools)
library(parallel)
library(data.table)

# function to plot a single umigroup
# p = plotData
# u = the umiGroup to plot
# ymin ymax coordinates on y axis
PlotUmiGroup <- function(p, u) {
  p <- p %>%
    filter(
      umiGroup == u,
      SHM != "x"
    )
  geom_rect(
    data = p,
    aes(xmin = pos - 0.4, xmax = pos + 0.4, ymin = start, ymax = end, fill = SHM), alpha = 0.3
  )
}

plot_aid_motif <- function(aid_motifs, selected_motif, position) {
  motif_nucl <- aid_motifs %>%
    filter(motif == selected_motif) %>%
    pull(nucl) %>%
    unique()
  motif_nucl_rc <- aid_motifs %>%
    filter(motif == paste0(selected_motif, "-RC")) %>%
    pull(nucl) %>%
    unique()

  list(
    # draw the motif
    geom_rect(
      data = aid_motifs %>% filter(grepl(selected_motif, motif)),
      aes(
        xmin = start - 0.4,
        xmax = end + 0.4,
        ymin = position - 0.07,
        ymax = position
      ),
      fill = color_aid_motif,
      alpha = 0.9
    ),
    # draw mutation nucleotide
    geom_rect(
      data = aid_motifs %>% filter(motif == selected_motif),
      aes(
        xmin = start - 0.4 + nucl_pos,
        xmax = start + 0.4 + nucl_pos,
        ymin = position - 0.07,
        ymax = position
      ),
      fill = palette_nucleotides[motif_nucl],
      alpha = 0.7
    ),
    geom_rect(
      data = aid_motifs %>% filter(motif == paste0(selected_motif, "-RC")),
      aes(
        xmin = start - 0.4 + nucl_pos,
        xmax = start + 0.4 + nucl_pos,
        ymin = position - 0.07,
        ymax = position
      ),
      fill = palette_nucleotides[motif_nucl_rc],
      alpha = 0.85
    )
  )
}

mode <- function(x) {
  ux <- unique(x)
  ux[which.max(tabulate(match(x, ux)))]
}
```

#### constants

```{r}
mc_cores <- 8

aid_motif_regex <- list(
  "WRCY"    = "[AT][AG]C[CT]",
  "WRCY-RC" = "[AG]G[CT][AT]",
  "RCG"     = "[AG]CG",
  "RCG-RC"  = "CG[CT]",
  "WA"      = "[AT]A",
  "WA-RC"   = "T[AT]"
)

## COLORS
color_cdr <- "#FCA17D"
color_aid_motif <- "#d7bcff"
color_aid_motif_2 <- "#a3d5cc"

palette_nucleotides <- c(
  A = "#00a853", C = "#008bcb", G = "#fde064", T = "#ee273f"
)
```



##### extract data from JS output files of cells with events

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# read clone table
clones <-
  bind_rows(
    read_csv("~/repositories/FL_10X_2/250_Clonotypes/outs/clonesMulti_2022_06_09.csv"),
    read_csv("~/repositories/FL_10X_2/250_Clonotypes/outs/clones_2022_01_18.csv"),
    read_rds("~/repositories/FL_10X_2/250_Clonotypes.freeze02/outs/clonesB_20210823.rds")
  ) %>%
  # add ig
  mutate(
    cell = substr(barcode, 1, 16),
    ig = case_when(
      v_gene %like% "IGH" ~ "HC",
      v_gene %like% "IGK" ~ "LC",
      v_gene %like% "IGL" ~ "LC"
    )
  ) %>%
  distinct(source, subject, barcode, chain, .keep_all = TRUE)


# dir of files JS
files <-
  list.files("~/repositories/FL_10X_2/310_Caught_in_the_act_AID/outs/fasta_SHM_cells/", pattern = "K.*\\.fasta", full.names = TRUE)

events <-
  rbindlist(
    mclapply(files,
      function(f) {
        print(f)
        # load fasta: names and sequences
        df <- read.fasta(f, as.string = T) %>%
          unlist() %>%
          data.frame(name = names(.), seq = .) %>%
          # extract variables from name and bind
          separate(
            name,
            into = c("source", "subject", "ig", "cell", "umi", "pos_cons", "pos", "mut1"),
            sep = "[-_]",
            remove = FALSE
          ) %>%
          mutate(pos = as.integer(pos))

        # get the event positions (may be >1)
        events <-
          df %>%
          distinct(pos) %>%
          # remove NA in position
          filter(!is.na(pos))

        if (nrow(events) >= 1) {
          # inspect all positions
          d <-
            rbindlist(
              lapply(
                1:nrow(events),
                function(e) {
                  # event rows
                  d <- df %>%
                    filter(pos == events$pos[e]) %>%
                    mutate(
                      eventUmis_A = nrow(filter(., mut1 == "A")),
                      eventUmis_C = nrow(filter(., mut1 == "C")),
                      eventUmis_G = nrow(filter(., mut1 == "G")),
                      eventUmis_T = nrow(filter(., mut1 == "T")),
                    )

                  # extract cell CR-IMGT data from clones
                  imgt_cell <-
                    clones %>%
                    filter(
                      source == unique(d$source),
                      subject == unique(d$subject),
                      cell %like% unique(d$cell)
                    ) %>%
                    filter(ig == unique(d$ig))

                  # from the old files, sometimes 2 rows are remaining
                  if (nrow(imgt_cell) > 1) {
                    imgt_cell <-
                      imgt_cell %>%
                      filter(domVgeneIMGT == TRUE)
                  }

                  # cells may be missing from current version of clones
                  if (nrow(imgt_cell) > 0) {
                    # detect start of V(D)J in umi sequences
                    d[, c("alignStart", "alignWidth")] <- t(sapply(
                      1:nrow(d),
                      function(r) {
                        # align to get start of V(D) in the umi seq
                        aln <- pairwiseAlignmentPreset(
                          toupper(as.character(d[r, "seq"])),
                          toupper(imgt_cell$seq),
                          score = FALSE
                        )
                        return(c(aln@pattern@range@start, aln@pattern@range@width))
                      }
                    ))

                    d <- d %>%
                      mutate(
                        # cut V(D)J
                        seqVDJ     = toupper(substr(seq, alignStart, alignStart + alignWidth)),
                        # cut mutation
                        mut2       = toupper(substr(seqVDJ, pos, pos)),
                        # is mut1 == mut2: detected letters are indeed the JS reported variant
                        mutMatch   = unique(mut1 == mut2),
                        # the nt at pos in CR
                        cellRanger = substr(imgt_cell$seq, pos, pos),
                      ) %>%
                      relocate(mut2, .after = mut1) %>%
                      relocate(mutMatch, .after = eventUmis_T)

                    # the PO sequence
                    d[, "PO"] <-
                      clones %>%
                      filter(
                        source == unique(d$source),
                        subject == unique(d$subject),
                        barcode == "PO"
                      ) %>%
                      # add ig
                      mutate(ig = case_when(
                        chain == "IGH" ~ "HC",
                        chain %in% c("IGK", "IGL") ~ "LC"
                      )) %>%
                      filter(ig == unique(d$ig)) %>%
                      pull(seq) %>%
                      # substr( start = unique( d$pos ), stop = unique( d$pos ) ) %>%
                      toupper()
                  }
                  return(d)
                }
              )
            )
        }
      },
      mc.cores = mc_cores
    ),
    fill = TRUE
  ) %>%
  # create event id and cell id
  mutate(
    id = paste(source, cell, pos, sep = "_"),
    sourceCellIg = paste0(source, "_", cell, "_", ig)
  ) %>%
  relocate(id, .before = name) %>%
  relocate(sourceCellIg, .after = id)

# # join with cellranger seq
out <- events %>%
  left_join(
    clones %>%
      mutate(cell = substr(barcode, 1, 16)) %>%
      dplyr::rename(seqCR = seq) %>%
      select(source, subject, cell, chain, seqCR, ig) %>%
      distinct(source, subject, cell, seqCR, ig),
    by = c("source", "subject", "cell", "ig")
  ) %>%
  # for some cells I have no data in clones from cellRanger data
  # various reasons, checked 3 with Julieta, all make sense
  filter(!is.na(seqVDJ))

# write as fasta for IMGT vQuest to obtain FR-CDR positions, can be done on cellRanger vdj
seqinr::write.fasta(
  sequences = as.list(out %>%
    distinct(id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    # slice_head( n = 50 ) %>%
    pull(seqVDJ)),
  names = as.list(out %>%
    distinct(id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    # slice_head( n = 50 ) %>%
    pull(id)),
  as.string = TRUE,
  file.out = paste0("../310_Caught_in_the_act_AID/outs/forIMGT.fasta")
)

# read manually saved IMGT output
IMGTout <-
  read_delim("../310_Caught_in_the_act_AID/outs/IMGT_Vquest_for_CDR_FR/highV_quest/3_Nt-sequences.txt",
    "\t",
    escape_double = FALSE, trim_ws = TRUE, show_col_types = FALSE
  ) %>%
  select(
    -`N-REGION`,
    c(
      `Sequence ID`, `FR1-IMGT start`, `FR1-IMGT end`, `CDR1-IMGT start`, `CDR1-IMGT end`, `FR2-IMGT start`,
      `FR2-IMGT end`, `CDR2-IMGT start`, `CDR2-IMGT end`, `FR3-IMGT start`,
      `FR3-IMGT end`, `CDR3-IMGT start`, `CDR3-IMGT end`, `FR4-IMGT start`, `FR4-IMGT end`
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename(id = `Sequence ID`)

# join in
out <-
  left_join(out,
    IMGTout,
    by = "id"
  ) %>%
  # remove rows without IMGT data
  filter(!is.na(`FR1-IMGT start`))

# number of cells with events
print(paste(
  "number of cells with event(s) = ",
  events %>%
    distinct(source, subject, cell) %>%
    nrow()
))

# number of events
print(paste0(
  "number of events = ",
  events %>%
    distinct(source, subject, cell, ig, pos) %>%
    nrow()
))
```

##### plotting

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=22, fig.height=3.5}
# create output dir
mkdirs("outs/shm_events_img")

# height was 5
# visualization of SHM CITA
cell_ids <- out %>%
  pull(sourceCellIg) %>%
  unique()

lapply(cell_ids, function(id) {
  print(id)
  # extract event
  s <- substr(id, 1, 3)
  c <- substr(id, 5, 20)
  g <- substr(id, 22, 23)

  # filter rows
  d <- out %>%
    filter(
      source == s,
      cell == c,
      ig == g
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      POnt = substr(PO, pos, pos),
      seqCR = toupper(seqCR)
    ) %>%
    relocate(POnt, .after = pos)

  eventPos <-
    d$pos %>%
    unique() %>%
    sort()

  # some 3' nt may be N
  # trim everything to the shortest sequence
  nPositions <- na.exclude(str_locate(d$seqVDJ, "N+$")[, "start"] - 1)
  if (length(nPositions) > 0 || length(unique(nchar(d$seqVDJ))) > 1) {
    cut <- min(nPositions, unique(nchar(d$seqVDJ)))
    d <- d %>%
      mutate_at(
        c("seqVDJ", "PO", "seqCR"),
        ~ substr(., 1, cut)
      )
  }


  # in PO:
  # locate canonical AID motif wrCy, wrCy, rCg, cGy
  aid_motifs <- bind_rows(lapply(
    names(aid_motif_regex),
    function(m) {
      locs <- str_locate_all(
        toupper(unique(d$PO)),
        pattern = aid_motif_regex[[m]]
      )
      if (length(locs) > 0) {
        return(
          locs %>%
            as.data.frame() %>%
            mutate(motif = m)
        )
      } else {
        return(data.frame(start = c(), end = c(), motif = c()))
      }
    }
  )) %>%
    mutate(
      nucl = case_when(
        motif %in% c("WRCY", "RCG") ~ "C",
        motif %in% c("WRCY-RC", "RCG-RC") ~ "G",
        motif == "WA" ~ "A",
        motif == "WA-RC" ~ "T"
      ),
      nucl_pos = case_when(
        motif == "WRCY" ~ 2,
        motif == "WA-RC" ~ 0,
        .default = 1
      )
    ) %>%
    arrange(start)

  # these are the letters at the event position
  # PO: is the starting letter
  ev0 <- substr(unique(d$PO), unique(d$pos), unique(d$pos))
  # CR: from cellranger letter
  cr <- unique(d$cellRanger)
  # event letter( s )
  ev <- unique(d$mut1)
  # event is arising from PO?
  if (ev0 %in% ev) {
    # ev0 remains PO
    # ev1 is the other letter
    ev1 <- ev[which(ev != ev0)]
  } else {
    # is event not arising from PO?
    # just pick first and second
    ev0 <- ev[1]
    ev1 <- ev[2]
  }

  # group sequences by identical sequence of VDJ
  d <- d %>%
    group_by(seqVDJ) %>%
    mutate(umiGroupCount = n()) %>%
    slice_head(n = 1) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    # rank umis from ev0 to ev1
    mutate(is_ev0 = mut1 == ev0) %>%
    arrange(is_ev0, desc(umiGroupCount)) %>%
    rownames_to_column("umiGroup") %>%
    select(
      subject, ig, mut1, umiGroup, umiGroupCount, PO, seqCR, seqVDJ,
      contains("IMGT")
    ) %>%
    # umiGroup fraction
    # calculate start and end of umi group on a scale 0 - 1
    mutate(
      size  = umiGroupCount / sum(umiGroupCount),
      end   = cumsum(size),
      start = end - size
    )

  # the sequence of PO and seqCR split into a table
  nchars <- nchar(unique(d$PO))
  plotData <- data.frame(
    pos         = 1:nchars,
    po          = unlist(str_split(unique(d$PO), "")),
    seqCR       = unlist(str_split(unique(d$seqCR), ""))[1:nchars],
    cons        = "x"
  )
  # fill the table with umis as variables, set all values in row to "x"
  plotData[, unique(d$umiGroup)] <- "x"

  # find all positions with mutations in umis
  mutPos <-
    sapply(
      1:nrow(d),
      function(i) {
        pairwiseAlignmentPreset(
          d$seqVDJ[i] %>%
            # remove "N" (missing nt) from the sequence
            # to exclude these from alignment
            gsub(pattern = "N", replacement = ""),
          unique(d$PO),
          score = FALSE
        )@pattern@mismatch@unlistData
      }
    ) %>%
    unlist() %>%
    unique() %>%
    sort()

  # replace x at all mutPos
  for (i in mutPos) {
    # copy letters from each umi at mutpos
    plotData[i, d$umiGroup] <- as.list(substr(d$seqVDJ, i, i))
  }
  plotData[which(!plotData$pos %in% mutPos), c("po", "seqCR")] <- "x"

  # create consensus based on the umis that underly the event
  for (i in mutPos) {
    plotData$cons[i] <- mode(unlist(sapply(
      1:nrow(d),
      function(r) {
        rep(substr(d$seqVDJ[r], i, i), d$umiGroupCount[r])
      }
    )))
  }

  # make long
  plotData <- plotData %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = colnames(plotData[5:ncol(plotData)]),
      names_to = "umiGroup", values_to = "SHM"
    ) %>%
    # join in umi group count, size, start, end
    left_join(
      d %>% select(umiGroup, size, start, end),
      by = "umiGroup"
    )

  # table for FR and CDR starts
  frCdr <- d %>%
    select(contains("IMGT")) %>%
    slice_head(n = 1) %>%
    t() %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    dplyr::rename(pos = V1) %>%
    rownames_to_column(var = "name") %>%
    filter(grepl("(start|end)$", name)) %>%
    mutate(pos = as.integer(pos)) %>%
    separate(name, into = c("reg", "place"), sep = " ") %>%
    pivot_wider(id_cols = "reg", names_from = "place", values_from = "pos") %>%
    mutate(reg = sub("-IMGT", "", reg))

  # x-axis limits
  xLimitsBreaksNumbers <- unique(c(
    1, seq(from = 50, to = unique(nchar(d$seqVDJ)), by = 50),
    nchar(unique(d$seqVDJ))
  )) |>
    # not within -3 to +3 letters from events AND the end
    discard(
      ~ .x %in% unique(c(
        c(sapply(seq(-4, 4), function(x) {
          eventPos - x
        })),
        nchar(unique(d$PO)) - c(1:4)
      ))
    ) |>
    # add eventPos
    base::append(eventPos) |>
    sort.int()

  xLimitsBreaksColors <- sapply(xLimitsBreaksNumbers, function(x) {
    if (x %in% eventPos) "red" else "black"
  })

  seq_length <- max(nchar(d$seqVDJ %>% unique()))

  p <-ggplot() +
    ggtitle(paste0(
      unique(d$subject), "  |  ", s, "  |  cell = ", c, "  |  ",
      unique(d$ig), "  |  SHM caught in the act @ nt ", paste(eventPos, collapse = " ")
    )) +
    theme_light() +
    # fixed colors for bases
    scale_fill_manual(
      values =
        palette_nucleotides %>%
          setNames(c("A", "C", "G", "T"))
    ) +

    # CDR
    geom_rect(
      data = frCdr %>%
        filter(reg %like% "CDR"),
      aes(xmin = start - 0.5, xmax = end + 0.5, ymin = 0, ymax = 1),
      fill = color_cdr, alpha = 0.2
    ) +
    # custom breaks on x axis with event pos = red
    scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = xLimitsBreaksNumbers) +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(color = xLimitsBreaksColors)) +

    # PO
    # background
    geom_rect(
      data = plotData %>% distinct(pos, .keep_all = TRUE),
      aes(xmin = pos - 0.4, xmax = pos + 0.4, ymin = -0.1, ymax = -0.01),
      fill = "#dadada"
    ) +
    # letters that have changed
    geom_rect(
      data = plotData %>% filter(po != "x") %>% distinct(pos, .keep_all = TRUE),
      aes(xmin = pos - 0.4, xmax = pos + 0.4, ymin = -0.1, ymax = -0.01, fill = po)
    ) +
    annotate("text", label = "primordial  ", x = 14 + seq_length, y = -0.05, hjust = 1) +
    annotate("text", label = "wrCy motif  ", x = 14 + seq_length, y = -0.14, hjust = 1) +
    annotate("text", label = "wA motif  ", x = 14 + seq_length, y = -0.22, hjust = 1) +
    annotate("text", label = "rCg motif  ", x = 14 + seq_length, y = -0.295, hjust = 1) +

    # umigroups, iterate, alpha 0.5 for all SHM
    sapply(
      unique(plotData$umiGroup),
      function(umiGroup) {
        PlotUmiGroup(plotData, umiGroup)
      }
    ) +

    # bold lines at event position (s)
    geom_rect(
      data = plotData %>% filter(pos %in% eventPos),
      aes(xmin = pos - 0.6, xmax = pos + 0.6, ymin = start, ymax = end, fill = SHM)
    ) +

    # AID motifs
    mapply(function(motif, pos) {
      plot_aid_motif(aid_motifs, motif, pos)
    }, c("WRCY", "WA", "RCG"), c(-0.11, -0.19, -0.27)) +

    # styling
    guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "base")) +
    xlab("position") +
    ylab("UMIs") +
    theme(
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      panel.border = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_blank(),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 16), # face = "bold" ),
      axis.text.y = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_text(
        size = 18, angle = 90, # face = "bold"
        hjust = 0.6, margin = margin(r = 6)
      ),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 24), # face = "bold" ),
      legend.key.width = unit(0.4, "cm"),
      legend.key.height = unit(1, "cm"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 17),
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 17)
    ) +

    # hlines to separate umi groups
    geom_segment(
      data = d %>% filter(start != 0),
      aes(y = start, yend = start),
      x = 0, xend = seq_length,
      linewidth = 0.25,
      color = "#dadada",
    ) +
    # yaxis labels with umi group counts
    geom_text(
      data = d %>% mutate(labelPos = (start + end) / 2),
      aes(x = -2, y = labelPos, label = umiGroupCount), size = 4, hjust = 0
    )

  ggsave(
    str_interp("outs/shm_events_img/${unique(d$subject)}_${s}_${c}_${unique(d$ig)}.pdf"),
    p,
    width = 22,
    height = 3.5
  )

  p
})
```
